seoTitle: Cy-Fair ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & PDF
seoDescription: See the Cy-Fair ISD 2026-2027 calendar, including the first and last day, holidays, school breaks, student no-school days, official PDF and calendar download.
instructionalDaysDescription: MySchoolDates calculation. Calculated from weekdays between August 12, 2026 and May 27, 2027, excluding the published breaks, holidays, and student no-school days. The scheduled total may increase if CFISD activates designated make-up days.
calendarNotes:
This page covers the CFISD district calendar. Professional days and teacher workdays are shown as no-school dates for students when the official calendar marks them as student holidays.

Some student holidays are also listed by CFISD as school closure make-up or inclement-weather make-up days. Those dates may become instructional days if the district uses them to make up a closure; confirm the official CFISD calendar and district announcements after weather or emergency closures.

calendarFaqs.q: Does CFISD list professional days in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. The 2026-2027 CFISD district calendar lists pre-service professional days on August 3-11, in-year professional days on January 4, February 15, and April 26, and a post-school-year professional day on May 28. In-year professional days are shown as no-school dates for students. Some student holidays are also listed as school closure make-up or inclement-weather make-up days, so families should re-check CFISD announcements after closures.

yearNumbers.label: Currently Scheduled Additional No-School Weekdays
yearNumbers.detail: Includes Labor Day, October 9 Student Holiday / Possible Weather Make-up Day, November 3 Student Holiday / Possible School Closure Make-up Day, January 4 Professional Day, Martin Luther King Jr. Day, February 15 Professional Day, March 12 Student Holiday / Possible Weather Make-up Day, March 26 Student/Staff Holiday, and April 26 Professional Day. Break periods are excluded. This count may decrease if CFISD activates one or more designated make-up days.

whatsNew.title: What's New for 2026-2027
content: The first day moves from August 13 in 2025-2026 to August 12 in 2026-2027.
The last day moves from May 28 in 2025-2026 to May 27 in 2026-2027.
Spring Break moves from March 9-13 in 2025-2026 to March 15-19 in 2026-2027.

events.name: Student Holiday / Possible Weather Make-up Day
events.description: CFISD labels this date as Teacher Work Day / School Closure Make-up Day / Student Holiday / Inclement Weather Day. It may become an instructional day if the district uses it to make up a closure.

events.name: Student Holiday / Possible School Closure Make-up Day
events.description: CFISD labels this date as Teacher Work Day / School Closure Make-up Day / Student Holiday. It may become an instructional day if the district uses it to make up a closure.

events.name: Student Holiday / Possible Weather Make-up Day
events.description: CFISD labels this date as Teacher Work Day / School Closure Make-up Day / Student Holiday / Inclement Weather Day. It may become an instructional day if the district uses it to make up a closure.
